description: At the 50% completion mark, a project manager needs to forecast the final project cost based on performance to date.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the project's Budget at Completion (BAC), Earned Value (EV), and Actual Cost (AC).
Calculate the Cost Performance Index (CPI) and Estimate at Completion (EAC).

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates CPI = EV/AC = 0.91 and EAC = BAC/CPI = $550k.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report indicating a forecasted cost overrun of $50,000.

expected_outcome.value: A cost forecast report is generated with the key metrics and conclusion.
